scenario_name: Weak Evidence Cannot Support Strong Conclusion
description: A single small manufacturer-sponsored study with N=30 cannot produce a 'strong' conclusion for a clinical performance claim. The system must cap the conclusion at 'limited'.

input.ifu_text: Device provides superior hemostasis in all vascular procedures.

available_evidence.findings: Hemostasis achieved in 28/30 (93%). No control group.

expected_expert_reasoning.reason: Single small (N=30) manufacturer-sponsored pilot study without control group. Manufacturer data alone cannot support strong or moderate clinical conclusions.
